project_request: AI test generator that analyzes code and generates comprehensive test suites.

questions.question: Which test frameworks should the generator support initially?
What types of tests should the AI generate?
How should the tool handle existing tests in a file?
options: Analyze gaps and generate missing tests only
questions.answer: Analyze gaps and generate missing tests only

questions.question: Should the generated tests include mocking setup for external dependencies?
options: No, just test the function directly
Yes, auto-mock common patterns (fetch, DB, fs)
Yes, with configurable mock strategy per dependency
questions.answer: Yes, auto-mock common patterns (fetch, DB, fs)
